title: pentacalia tingoensis
intro: Pentacalia tingoensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Tingo pentacalia. It is native to Peru, and its medicinal properties lie in its leaves, which have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections. Pentacalia tingoensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for overall health benefits.
